english: Salutations to Narayana, salutations to Satyanarayana
Salutations to the best of persons, salutations to you who are the crest of the Vedas
roman: Namah Shri Purushottamaya namo Veda shikhaya te

english: O embodiment of truth, the Truth itself, devoted to the vow of truth
roman: Satya svarupa satyaya satya vrata parayana

english: O Satyanarayana, faithful to truth — salutations to you
roman: Satya Narayana deva satya sandhaya te namah

english: Lord Satyanarayana, devotees observe your vow
roman: Bhagavan Satya Narayan vrat karte bhakt

hindi: प्रसाद पाँचामृत खाते, मनोकामना पूर्ण होत॥
english: They eat the five-nectar prasad, and desires are fulfilled
roman: Prasad panchaamrit khaate manokaamna poorn hot

english: Whoever reads the Satyanarayana Stotram with devotion always
roman: Satya Narayana stotram yah pathed bhaktitah sada

english: By Satyanarayana's grace, desired works are accomplished
roman: Satya Narayana prasadad ishta karyam samridhyate
